title: FarmlandDelightCompat
description: Make some crops from other mods can be place on Rich Soil Farmland
body:
Make some crops from other mods can be place on Rich Soil Farmland.
The mod can be install server-side only but client won't see the planting animation. So client can install as their will. This mod was purposely born for playing with Cobblemon but as a side effect, it also make some other mod's crops can be place on Rich Soil Farmland as well.
